results.description: John Thune says they “don’t have the votes” to pass the SAVE America Act. Yet, some say they have 50 votes to pass the Act with a Talking Filibuster. President Trump has tied FISA and 702 to the passage of the SAVE Act. If it isn’t possible to pass it, let’s find out who is [...] The post JD Vance Calls for a Vote on SAVE Act: Put Everyone on Record appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Iran-US Talks: President Masoud Pezeshkian Says USD 6 Billion in Frozen Funds Held in Qatar Will Be Returned Under Preliminary Deal
results.description: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian has stated that USD 6 billion in frozen funds currently in Qatar's possession will be returned to Iran as part of the preliminary deal with the US to end the war, the Tasnim news agency reported. The statement coincided with the arrival of diplomatic delegations at the Swiss mountain resort of Burgenstock for the high-stakes discussions.

results.title: Alabama–Coushatta Tribe Celebrates Ground Breaking on New East Texas Casino Resort
results.description: The Alabama-Coushatta Tribe of Texas has officially started construction on the future Naskila Casino Resort, launching a development that tribal leaders expect will expand tourism, create new jobs, and strengthen long-term economic opportunities in Deep East Texas. Representatives of the tribe, local officials, casino employees, and community members gathered for a groundbreaking ceremony marking the start of work on the new property. The project will be developed on approximately 95 acres of tribal land in Leggett, a community located about [...] The post Alabama–Coushatta Tribe Celebrates Ground Breaking on New East Texas Casino Resort appeared first on World Casino News .

results.title: Most Israelis believe Iran emerged stronger from war — Poll suggests
results.description: A new opinion poll has revealed growing skepticism among Israelis over the outcome of the recent Middle East conflict, with many respondents believing that Iran emerged stronger from the war and subsequent agreement with the United States, raising concerns about Israel’s long-term security. The survey, conducted amid ongoing political debate over the conflict’s aftermath, found [...] The post Most Israelis believe Iran emerged stronger from war — Poll suggests appeared first on Daily Nigerian .
